checks.detail: Live trading feature flag is disabled.
checks.name: live_trading_disabled

checks.detail: Configure the isolated live wallet public address before funding.
checks.name: isolated_wallet_address

checks.detail: Live wallet must be separate from the main wallet.
checks.name: wallet_isolation

checks.detail: Live chain allowlist is restricted to Base.
checks.name: chain_allowlist_base

checks.detail: Live token allowlist includes USDC and WETH.
checks.name: token_allowlist_usdc_weth

checks.detail: Planned funding is within the $500 tiny-pilot ceiling.
checks.name: planned_wallet_ceiling

checks.detail: Planned ETH gas budget is within preparation range.
checks.name: planned_gas_budget

checks.detail: Set CRYPTOAI_MAX_LIVE_WALLET_USD to a value > 0 and <= 500 before any live pilot.
checks.name: configured_wallet_ceiling

checks.detail: Set CRYPTOAI_MAX_LIVE_TRADE_USD to a small value, usually $25-$50, before any live pilot.
checks.name: configured_trade_cap

checks.detail: Set CRYPTOAI_MAX_DAILY_LOSS_USD to a value > $0 and no larger than the live trade cap.
checks.name: configured_daily_loss

notes: Wallet Preflight is preparation-only and never approves live trading.
Do not configure private keys until the transaction path, simulation gate, and manual review are complete.
The first real-money pilot should use an isolated wallet on Base with a total wallet ceiling of $500 or less.
